subject: fix(export): halve PDF page dimensions for mobile viewer quality
body:
Digital PDF pages used pxToPt=1 creating 15"+ wide pages (1080×1350pt
for LinkedIn Portrait). Mobile PDF viewers scaled these 5:1 onto 3"
screens, degrading quality. Changed to pxToPt=0.5 (144 DPI) creating
~7.5" pages with only 2.5:1 viewer scaling.

Integer pixel-per-point ratios preserved: Low=2, Standard=4, High=6.
Also added document.fonts.ready wait and PDF metadata (title/creator).

Tags: export, pdf, mobile, quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch

title: halve PDF page dimensions for mobile viewer quality
